title: User Guides - Onboarding screens
scenario: Onboarding screens opened from App Settings > User Guides display correctly when navigating through all screens
steps: Tap on Account or Settings icon to open App Settings
Scroll to find and tap 'User Guides'
Swipe or tap through each onboarding screen (e.g., Next/Back arrows or dots)
Verify each onboarding screen displays correctly (text, images, layout)
expected: All onboarding screens open and display correctly with proper text, images, and layout when navigating through them.
